tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive completed successfully (rc=0); verify-install reported all 51 checks passing

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install reports 'Context7 MCP installed' and 'Context7 MCP configured'

tests.name: no_residual_backup_dir
tests.details: .claude-backup directory absent (init log shows 'Removed CDF migration backup')

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message (PR #18 U-N/U-O fix verified)

tests.name: baseline_phase1_completed
tests.details: All 5 phase1_architecture steps completed successfully (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized)

tests.name: baseline_feature_completed
tests.details: Feature 'uat-feat-1' completed full Build Loop (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated, feature_recorded) and recorded via test-gate.sh --record-feature; appears in build-progress.json features_completed array

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited rc=0; output shows 'POC Mode: sponsored poc -> Production', track upgrade light->standard, all updates committed (commit 0ff6653). U-E (poc_mode lookup from phase-state.json) confirmed fixed.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: .build_loop reset state preserved; build-progress.json features_completed still ['uat-feat-1'] post-upgrade

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output lists CLAUDE.md/PROJECT_INTAKE.md updates required and notes 'No additional tools required for the standard track'; provides 'Review CLAUDE.md for any remaining POC references' and 'Review PROJECT_INTAKE.md Section 8 governance fields' guidance

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema; upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited rc=1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision' message and showed pending question/options. PR #17 U-F fix confirmed.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header (lines 17-18) references both BL-015 (pending-approval sentinel) and BL-006 (pre-commit gate)

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep of upgrade output for __PROJECT_NAME__ / __PLATFORM__ / __LANGUAGE__ / __TRACK__ found no matches

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git log -p search for password/api[_-]?key/secret/token returned only documentation placeholders (e.g., 'your-app-password' in BitBucket setup docs and 'sk-abc123...' in security-scan-guide examples) — no actual credentials

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log absent (expected — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run)

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD unchanged (d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494). Untracked items (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) are pre-existing per setup snapshot, not introduced by this agent.

summary: Upgrade flow sponsored_poc/web/light -> production completed cleanly: init --non-interactive, Phase 1 + Phase 2 (1 feature recorded), pending-approval sentinel respected (U-F fix verified), upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited 0 with poc_mode read correctly (U-E fix verified), no placeholders, all state preserved, no framework contamination.
